name: Mandel-Halbmonde (Almond Crecents)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together butter and sugar until very light and fluffy.
2. Blend in extracts.
3. Mix in flour and almonds.
4. Using about 1 tablespoon of dough for each, shape into logs.
5. Bend the logs into crescents.
6. Place on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 12 to 15 minutes until light brown.
8. While warm, roll the crescents in confectioners' sugar.
9. Cool on racks and store in a tightly sealed container.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
